status: internal operating checklist, not buyer-facing copy
purpose: Give Ben a simple pre-call and during-call checklist for focused diagnostic pilot conversations.
before_call: Open the website and confirm the focused diagnostic pilot language is visible.
Have the focused diagnostic pilot one-pager ready if asked.
Keep the standing boundary line visible.
Do not discuss upper-tier pricing, strategic license, certification, benchmark, runtime monitoring, compliance, security, or safety guarantees.
Aim to identify one concrete workflow, not sell the whole stack.
during_call: Ask what AI-agent workflow they are considering, prototyping, or already testing.
Ask what systems or data sources the workflow touches.
Ask what inputs are treated as trusted.
Ask what actions the agent can recommend, initiate, or complete.
Ask where human approvals, handoffs, or review points exist.
Ask what happens when data is stale, incomplete, conflicting, or low-fidelity.
Ask how task completion is verified.
Ask what escalation, rollback, or recovery path exists.

fit_gate.green: One concrete workflow, meaningful downside if silent failure occurs, bounded context available, buyer understands diagnostic-only scope.
fit_gate.yellow: Workflow exists but context, owner, or boundary is unclear.
fit_gate.red: Buyer wants certification, compliance sign-off, runtime monitoring, security testing, deployment approval, legal/clinical/HR decision-making, free broad consulting, or guaranteed safety.

after_email_is_collected: Tell Ben to run: cd ~/specshift_terminal_intelligence && python3 v0_5/call_companion/specshift_call_companion.py
Choose mode 2 if call notes are being captured live.
Choose mode 3 if only a follow-up email draft is needed.
Generate Proton-ready draft and attachment list.
Review manually in Proton Mail from ben@specshiftlabs.com before sending.
failure_column: This checklist fails if the call drifts into broad free consulting, unsupported pricing, certification, compliance approval, runtime monitoring, security tooling, legal/clinical/HR advice, deployment approval, or guaranteed safety.
